LouCasa

Homes shaped by the light they live in.

LouCasa is the interiors house of LouEnterprises, built on a decade in private service to the world's most exacting households: how a home should welcome, how it should work, how it should feel.

That same eye now furnishes our own addresses. Every LouCasa stay is designed, dressed and kept by the studio itself — so guests live inside the work, not beside it.
